review_text: Nice pick up, good battery power, almost everything seems to fine, never disappointed with safety, visible and clear look, comfort is of the best level, easy services, low maintenance, you can take for even too long drives and highways, at this price segment it of its Best kind no one compares to nexon

Awesomeness car, Love it, budget friendly, cool looking, best car in this segment .i was so confused when i want to buy my first car. But it was worth for money trust me. It has every feature in it. Sporty look also. Tata nexon is segment killer. Any day i can go for it. Those people who has a budget around 15 lakh go for it

I regret buying the TATA Nexon Ev. The car never gives the promises mileage range, no matter how I drive. I've sent it to the workshop several times, but every time they return it with excuse instead of fixing it. It feels like Tata is just fooling customer with false claims. My honest advice please don't waste your money on Tata Evs instead buy some other company vehicle.

Car is good but doesn't get the exact kms as of showroom.maintenance is low.service is good.Takes much time to charge with home charging.price is moderate.performance is also good.suitable for low range distances.when comes to speed it also good.good space is sufficient.needed much sufficient space for 3people.overall it is budget as well as eco-friendly car.Thank you TATA thank you NEXON.
Very very good condition and very smooth to drive and fast charging and good range and very good pickup , with in the range of cost as well , suggest for buy

The pickup is decent but the battery range was not as impressive as advertised. For daily city rides it works fine but highway trips need proper planning for charging.
Build quality feels solid and safety is reassuring. However the infotainment system sometimes lags which can be slightly annoying while driving.
Expected better performance for the price. Charging time is quite long and the available charging stations around my area are still very limited.
Comfort level is good and the ride feels smooth on city roads. But the range drops quickly when using AC continuously.
The design and look of the car is attractive but the interior quality could have been better. Some plastic parts feel a bit cheap.
Driving experience is silent and smooth which is nice. Still the overall performance feels average compared to other EVs in this segment.
Battery backup is decent for short city commutes. Long drives are difficult due to lack of fast charging options nearby.
The car feels stable and safe on highways. However I noticed the real range is slightly lower than what was claimed.
Good ground clearance and comfortable suspension for rough roads. The only drawback is the long charging time.
The car looks stylish and modern but the infotainment interface needs improvement. Sometimes it becomes unresponsive.
Safety and build quality are definitely strong points. But overall driving performance feels just average.
The cabin is comfortable but boot space feels limited for family trips. Expected slightly more practicality.
Range is fine for office commuting but not ideal for frequent long drives. Charging network still needs improvement.
The ride quality is smooth but the car feels slightly expensive considering the features offered.
Electric drive is silent and enjoyable in traffic. However the charging time is something that could be improved.
The exterior design is very appealing but the software system sometimes shows small glitches.
Maintenance cost is lower than petrol cars which is good. Still the limited range makes long trips slightly inconvenient.
Good safety rating and solid body structure. But the real world battery range could definitely be better.
Driving comfort is good but the charging stations are not easily available in many areas which becomes frustrating.
Overall an average EV experience. Works fine for city usage but still has limitations for long distance travel.

I have been using this car for a few months and the driving experience is very smooth. The pickup is quite impressive and the cabin is comfortable. Range works fine for daily commuting but charging stations are still not very common.
The car feels solid and safe which is something Tata is known for. However the infotainment system sometimes becomes slow and slightly frustrating. Overall it is a decent EV for city usage.
Honestly I expected a bit more range for the price I paid. The design and comfort are good but charging time is quite long. It works okay for short trips but not very convenient for long drives.
The instant acceleration of the EV motor feels really nice while driving in the city. Interior space is comfortable for a small family. Battery range is acceptable but still could have been better.
Exterior design looks modern and stylish which I really like. Ride quality is smooth even on rough roads. But sometimes the real world battery range feels slightly lower than what was advertised.

Driving this EV in traffic is very relaxing because it is silent and smooth. The seats are comfortable for long rides as well. Only issue is that fast charging stations are still limited around my city.
The safety features and strong build quality give good confidence while driving. Performance is decent though not extremely powerful. Overall the experience has been satisfactory.
The car is good for daily commuting and office travel. However the charging time feels quite slow when compared to expectations. It is still manageable if you charge at home overnight.
I like the comfortable suspension and the smooth steering response. It handles potholes quite well on Indian roads. Range is average but still workable for city use.
Battery performance has been stable so far without major issues. The cabin feels quiet and premium. But the infotainment system could definitely be more responsive.
The driving experience is good but I felt the price is slightly high. Charging infrastructure is improving but still not perfect. Overall it is an okay EV option.
Very comfortable car for city driving and short highway trips. The acceleration is quick and smooth. But for very long journeys you need to carefully plan charging stops.
Interior design looks modern and spacious. However some of the materials inside could have felt more premium. The driving experience itself is quite good.
The car feels safe and well built which is very reassuring. But the actual driving range sometimes drops when using AC continuously. That part was slightly disappointing.
Maintenance cost is definitely lower compared to petrol vehicles. Driving is silent and comfortable. Still the charging time needs improvement.
The suspension handles bumps quite well and makes the ride smooth. I enjoy driving it daily for office commute. The only concern is the limited charging network.
Looks stylish and modern from the outside. Performance is decent though not extremely powerful. Overall it feels like a balanced electric SUV.
The build quality and safety rating are impressive. However the infotainment screen sometimes freezes which can be annoying. Apart from that the car drives nicely.
Battery range works well for daily commuting and short weekend trips. Driving is smooth and quiet which makes the experience pleasant. It is not perfect but still a good EV choice.
Overall the car performs well and feels comfortable to drive. Some improvements could be made in software and charging speed. But for city usage it does its job well.

The car feels very smooth while driving and the electric motor response is quick. Interior comfort is good for daily commuting. However the charging network in my area is still limited which makes long trips slightly inconvenient.
I like the strong build quality and the sense of safety this car provides. Driving in the city is easy and comfortable. The only downside I noticed is the slow charging time.
Honestly I expected a bit more range from the battery. The design and styling are attractive though. It works fine for short trips but not the best choice for long highway drives.
The ride quality is smooth and suspension handles rough roads well. Cabin noise is very low which makes the driving experience relaxing. Overall it feels like a good electric SUV.
Performance is decent and acceleration feels quick in city traffic. The infotainment system sometimes becomes slow which can be irritating. Apart from that the car is comfortable.
Battery performance has been stable so far and the running cost is very low. Charging at home makes things convenient. Still the real world range could have been slightly better.
Exterior design looks modern and stylish which I really like. The interior space is comfortable for a small family. But some interior materials could feel more premium.
Driving experience is quiet and smooth which is one of the best things about this car. Safety features are also impressive. Charging infrastructure however still needs improvement.
The car performs well in city conditions and traffic. Handling is light and easy for everyday driving. It is a good EV but slightly expensive compared to some competitors.
Overall the experience has been positive so far. Comfort level and ride quality are quite good. A faster charging system would make this car even better.

I bought this car with high expectations but the real world range is much lower than promised. In city traffic it is manageable, but on highways the battery drains faster than expected. Service center support has also been disappointing.
The car looks stylish from outside but ownership experience has been average. Charging takes too long at home and public chargers are not always available. It feels stressful to plan long trips.
Ride quality is decent and the cabin stays quiet, but software glitches spoil the overall experience. The screen freezes at times and small warning messages keep appearing randomly.
I like the pickup and smooth driving feel, but battery performance drops too much with AC on. For the price, I expected more consistency and better charging speed.
This EV is fine for daily office travel, but I would not recommend it for frequent highway driving. Range anxiety is real and charging stops take longer than they should.
Build quality feels strong but the interior does not match the price tag. Some panels feel basic and the infotainment response is slower than expected.
Driving is smooth and silent, which is the best part of this car. Still, the charging infrastructure around my area is poor and that makes ownership difficult.
The car is comfortable enough for city rides but the actual range keeps disappointing me. Every trip needs careful planning and that removes the convenience of having a personal vehicle.
The suspension is good and road presence is nice, but the software and connected features need serious improvement. Sometimes the system feels outdated.
Good safety and stable handling, but charging time is still a major issue. Overnight home charging works, yet quick top ups during trips are not as practical as I hoped.
I regret buying it mainly because of poor service response. The car itself is average, but after sales support makes the whole experience more frustrating.
The EV drive feels modern and smooth, but there are too many compromises in range and charging. It saves fuel cost but adds stress in other ways.
Looks attractive and drives well in the city, but long distance usability is weak. Public charging is inconsistent and the car takes time to recharge.
Battery backup is okay for short runs, but not reliable enough for flexible travel. I find myself avoiding trips because I do not trust the remaining range.
The instant torque is fun and the car feels easy to handle. Still, quality control could have been better because small issues started appearing too early.
I expected this car to be more refined. Instead, I got a decent EV with average interiors, average range, and service that does not always solve the problem properly.
For city commuting it works fine, but if someone is buying it thinking it will easily replace a petrol car in all conditions, that is not true in my experience.
Very silent cabin and smooth acceleration, but the battery percentage falls faster than expected when the car is fully loaded. That has been disappointing.
The design is good and the seats are reasonably comfortable. However, charging network support is still too weak to make ownership completely stress free.
This car is not bad, but it is also not as practical as the marketing suggests. Range and charging together remain the biggest drawbacks.
Initially I was excited, but over time the limited range and slow charging became irritating. I now use it only for short daily travel.
The car feels planted on the road and safety is reassuring. But the real ownership experience is affected by software bugs and service delays.
I appreciate the low running cost, yet that alone does not make up for the charging inconvenience. Owning this EV requires patience.
The battery range is acceptable only if your routine is fixed and predictable. For people with sudden long travel needs, this car can become restrictive.
Comfort is decent and cabin insulation is nice, but the infotainment lag keeps annoying me. For a modern EV, the user interface should have been much better.
I found the car overpriced for what it offers. Good safety is there, but range, charging, and software experience still need a lot of improvement.
The best part is the silent drive, but the worst part is planning every charge carefully. That kind of dependence reduces spontaneity in travel.
The steering is light and city driving is easy, but actual battery efficiency changes too much with weather and AC usage. That unpredictability is frustrating.
Home charging is convenient, but public charging experience has been unreliable. Some stations do not work properly and others are too crowded.
It is a decent first EV but not a great one. Tata needs to improve consistency in software, service, and real world range performance.
The car feels sturdy and safe, which I liked from day one. Unfortunately the battery range does not inspire enough confidence for longer drives.
Even though the ride is smooth, I keep facing small electronic issues. Nothing major individually, but together they make the car feel unfinished.
This EV saves money on fuel, but the ownership experience comes with too many compromises. Charging wait time and inconsistent range are the biggest issues.
Performance is okay, but I expected better refinement in the cabin and electronics. It feels more practical than premium.
The car is easy to drive in traffic and has decent ground clearance. However, boot space and battery confidence both feel limited for a family car.
Good pickup and silent operation, but after sales experience has not been satisfying. Service visits take time and answers are often unclear.
Range claims look good on paper, but everyday usage tells a different story. I always keep extra margin because I do not fully trust the estimate.
The exterior looks bold, but the inside feels average for this price. Features are there, yet overall polish is missing.
I like the idea of electric driving, but this car still feels like a compromise product. It is practical only in limited use cases.
Not a terrible car, but definitely not worry free. Range anxiety, charger planning, and software irritations keep reminding me that this EV is still maturing.
The seats are comfortable and ride quality is fine, but charging speed should have been better. Waiting this long for a full charge feels outdated.
Daily commuting is easy and cheap, yet the car loses practicality when used outside the city. The lack of dependable public chargers is the main problem.
The car handles well and feels safe, but software bugs and sensor warnings have made me visit the service center more than expected.
It drives nicely in Eco mode for urban use. Still, I am not impressed by the overall value because the charging inconvenience is too big.
The low running cost attracted me, but the actual ownership experience has been mixed. Battery drain under heavy use is worse than I thought.
Road presence is strong and the car feels safe. Unfortunately the real advantage gets reduced by the time spent searching and waiting for chargers.
This car works best as a second vehicle for city usage. As a primary all purpose car, it still feels restrictive.
Cabin comfort is acceptable and acceleration is quick, but too many small glitches make the ownership experience less premium than expected.
I expected better battery confidence from a car in this segment. The remaining range estimate changes too quickly and feels unreliable.
The smooth silent nature of EV driving is enjoyable. But overall this vehicle still needs improvement in charging ecosystem and software refinement.
The car is very smooth to drive and city performance is excellent. Pickup is quick and the silent cabin makes everyday commuting more comfortable.
I really like the strong build quality and safe feel of this vehicle. It gives confidence on highways and handles rough roads reasonably well.
Charging at home overnight has made my routine very easy. For office travel and local use, this car has been a practical and economical option.
The instant torque is one of the best things about this EV. Overtaking in city traffic feels effortless and smooth.
Ride comfort is good and the suspension handles bad roads better than expected. It feels like a nice family EV for regular use.
The exterior design looks modern and sporty. It has a strong road presence and gets noticed easily.
I am happy with the low running cost and smooth drive quality. It has reduced my monthly travel expense significantly.
The car feels stable on highways and comfortable in daily traffic. Overall the driving experience is pleasant and easy.
Battery performance has been reliable for my daily commute. I charge once at home and use it without much worry for city travel.
The cabin remains quiet and peaceful even during fast acceleration. That makes long drives less tiring.
I like the modern dashboard layout and the ease of driving an automatic EV. It feels convenient and beginner friendly.
For city use, this has been one of the best cars I have driven. Smooth response, no gear shifts, and very low noise.
The seats are comfortable and cabin space is enough for a small family. Daily usage has been quite satisfying.
Good balance between comfort, performance, and efficiency. It is a sensible EV option in this price range.
Steering is light and visibility is good, which makes city driving very easy. It is practical for office and market runs.
The car feels well planted at normal highway speeds and braking is reassuring. Safety and confidence are strong points.
Very little vibration and no engine noise make this car enjoyable to drive. It feels modern compared to traditional fuel cars.
The regenerative braking is useful and helps improve efficiency in traffic. Once you get used to it, driving becomes very convenient.
The strong body and comfortable ride quality make it a reassuring choice. I feel good using it for my daily family travel.
Overall it is a nice EV for urban use with low running cost and good comfort. It fits well into a fixed daily routine.
The car started well for me, but after a few months I noticed the range is not consistent. On some days it performs fine and on others the battery drains much faster.
I like the smooth acceleration and silent cabin, but the infotainment system feels unreliable. Sometimes it hangs and restarts without reason.
Good for city commute, but real world practicality is still limited. Long distance travel needs too much planning and patience.
The design is attractive and the car feels safe, but charging time is simply too much. If you miss one charging cycle, your whole schedule gets affected.
This EV is comfortable to drive, but I do not think it is worth the full price. There are too many compromises in battery range and software quality.
The suspension works well on rough roads and ground clearance is helpful. Still, the charger network near me is weak, which makes the car less useful than expected.
The driving experience is nice, but I keep getting worried about range whenever battery drops below half. That constant concern takes away from the enjoyment.
Cabin comfort is good and the car feels stable, but interior fit and finish could be much better. Some parts feel average for this price.
I expected the service center to be more helpful with EV related questions. Instead, most answers were vague and the issues were not clearly resolved.
There are things to like, such as instant torque and low running cost, but the overall experience still feels unfinished because of glitches and charging limitations.
The car looks premium from outside but daily ownership is not that smooth. Range drops noticeably with AC and loaded passengers.
I use it mainly in the city and it performs okay, but it has not fully replaced the convenience of my previous petrol car. Flexibility is still missing.
The vehicle is safe and easy to drive, but the charging experience has been the weak point. Fast chargers are either busy or too far away.
Performance is decent but not exciting enough to justify the compromises. It feels more like an acceptable EV than a truly satisfying one.
The best part is city drivability, but the worst part is planning around battery percentage all the time. I did not expect to think this much before every trip.
Home charging is useful, but if you live in an area without strong public charging support, this car becomes restrictive. That has been my biggest lesson.
The cabin is quiet and suspension is comfortable, though the software side still needs polish. Alerts and interface lag reduce the sense of quality.
I wanted to love this car because the concept is great. But in reality, range shortfall and inconsistent support have made the experience only average.
Battery efficiency is fine only under ideal conditions. Once weather, traffic, or AC usage changes, the range becomes less dependable.
Overall the car is manageable for short trips, but not confidence inspiring for wider use. There is still a gap between brochure expectations and actual ownership.
The body feels solid and road manners are decent, but charging speed remains too slow for comfort. I expected faster turnaround during travel.
It is smooth, safe, and economical in some ways, but the tradeoff comes in freedom of movement. A fuel car still feels less complicated.
The car performs well enough in city traffic, yet the overall ownership experience is mixed because of poor range confidence and software quality.
I appreciate the silent ride and strong structure, but I am not satisfied with the actual value. At this cost, I expected a more polished package.
Not everything is bad, but too many things feel incomplete. Charging support, interface smoothness, and real range all need further improvement.
The vehicle is easy to drive and comfortable enough, but I would only suggest it to people with very predictable daily travel needs.
Service quality has not matched my expectations. The car itself is acceptable, but ownership satisfaction depends a lot on support, and that has been weak.
I enjoy the smooth drive, but every positive point gets reduced by the practical issues around range and charging. The convenience factor is still not fully there.
It is a decent urban EV with nice comfort and safety, but not a complete all purpose solution. Long term satisfaction depends on your usage pattern.
My experience has been mostly average to disappointing. The car is not terrible, but it needs better charging support, better software, and more dependable real world range.
